label: BrowserUse • fill and submit a contact form
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/contact and submit the contact form with name 'Ada Lovelace' and email 'ada@example.com'.
notes: LIVE. The run model drives the REAL browser_use host against FixtureBrowserWorld — pages and snapshots are deterministic, so a failure attributes to the model's planning/ref use, not network or rendering. The core harness signal: navigate, type into both fields (refs from the snapshot), submit, and confirm the thanks page.

pages.title: Contact Us
pages.bodyText: Contact us. Fill in your name and email, then press Send.

pages.title: Thank You
pages.bodyText: Thanks! Your message has been sent.
